title: Khovanschina
writer: Anna Abramova, Dmitri Shostakovich, Vera Stroyeva
actors: Aleksey Krivchenya, Anton Grigoryev, Aleksei Maslennikov
plot: An opera about the Moscow uprising of 1682. Reacting against Westernization, boyar Ivan Khovansky raises a rebellion against regent Sofia Alekseyevna and the two young Tsars Peter I and Ivan V.
